review_text: We only stayed one night. The park was nice, although the amenities could have been cleaner. Unfortunately, the night was very noisy and we noticed a few homeless people staying overnight in tents, which did not feel ideal for a family holiday park.
Great stay, great staff, great facilities
Great little spot ideally located, close to shops and the ever cool Miami market ta. Reasonable prices.
Was a great place to go. Had a good vibe to the place great staff

Ganz ok, entscheidend war vor allem die Lage: sehr gut, v.a. für mit dem Bike ins Zentrum oder auch in den Süden (Currumbin) Die Amneties sind sauber und eigentlich alles i.O.

Kritikpunkte: Kleinkinder dürfen nicht auf die Rutsche (erst ab 1.2m)

Campersite ziemlich uneben trotz Erneuerungen im Campground… Schade.
Loved our stay at Nobbies Beach Caravan Park. Nikki and the owner are incredibly lovely, helpful and welcoming. You can really tell they care about their guests.
環境很棒 喜歡

We booked for 2 nights. |I left after 1. ||We travelled for 3550KM between Brisbane and Adelaide and I would say this was the one I liked the least. ||Look, the site didn’t DO anything majorly wrong, I just didn’t like the quality of it, the vibe!, the closeness of pitches, the other guests weren’t quite what I was expecting, the staff were a bit ‘meh’ and in the end we just left and lost the money and headed to our next site a night early. I was happy to lose the money! ||This site would likely suit people who’re booking it BECAUSE of the slide, not that I saw it - but that must be a draw for some.

Staff was extremely rude to my family members. My cousin asked how to climb up to the top of the park near the game hub and a staff member said in an extremely rude tone “Just Climb!” Another time is when my brother was waiting at the top of the slide in the pool and a staff member screamed at him telling him to go down but there was nobody even up there with him

very old toilet and shower facilities. And not clean at all.

The powered sites are super close next to each other and there‘s not a single tree. From the look this is probably the worst camping we‘ve ever stayed along the east coast.
The locations is good because there‘s a bus stop nearby and they‘re just building a tram stop there as well which takes you to the center.
Very tight space for vans. You could shake the hand of the neighbor if you want to. Showers and toilets were dirty from lunch time on.

Villa was ok, were happy with beds and excellent shower. Service- there wasn’t any, 5 nights and nothing was changed such as towels etc. one t-towel supplied, no soap, no dishwasher liquid. Villa had hole in security door which wouldn’t lock, and not the safest place to be with permanent people living on the premises. Everyone in the van side of things were very cramped in. If more than one car per 2 brm Villa or park site you had to park out on the Street. Not one staff member came to make sure we were enjoying our 5 day stay.  Kids enjoyed the water slide however not supervised. Entrance/book-in driveway was a challenge. Overall a bit disappointing for what it cost.
Van Site 32 on corner is perfect for a long rig.  Pool was always cloudy over the 22d I was there but nonetheless refreshing
Brilliant place. Great staff. Awesome facilities. Highly recommend.
my husband proposed to me here and we intimacy. he came all over the sheets i hope u washed them
Great park and except the roadworks make it a nightmare to get into while towing a caravan
Comfortable stay and a great location

Stayed here on the weekend in the Deluxe Villa 2 bedroom. Was a sweet little getaway with the family. The Villa was nice, had everything that we needed. Kids loved the pool and the big slide. Recommend checking out the Miami Markets at night only a 7min walk away. Apart from the dramatic Weather forecast. All was well. Will definitely visit again Thanks Nobby for the great memories…
Great place, big pool clean amenities
Motorhoming so rooms unfair. Nice site great staff.
The staff surprised me with an upgrade to a 2 bedroom cabin for one night. Cabin very clean. Park atmosphere happy & friendly. Would recommend NBHP. Thankyou

We recently stayed at Nobby’s Beach Holiday Village and unfortunately had a very disappointing experience.

We were allocated a tent site directly beside the bins without prior notice, which caused issues immediately. When I tried to call the office to discuss the tent location and seek assistance, my call was not returned.

There were ongoing disturbances throughout our stay, including cars driving in and out of the park throughout the night on both nights we stayed, which made it very difficult to sleep.

Noise late at night, repeated disruptions, and unsafe behaviour in the pool area meant my children did not feel comfortable or safe using the facilities. As a result, they were unable to enjoy key amenities during our stay.

I made multiple attempts to contact management during and after our stay, including phone calls, a website feedback submission, and email, but received no response.

What was meant to be a relaxing end to the holidays turned into a stressful and exhausting experience, and the lack of follow-up has been equally disappointing.
Toilet en douches van de camping niet schoon en verouderd

Booked online, got there and received a free upgrade into one of the premium villas from paying studio prices, I extended my stay and retained my booking rate. The villas which has its own private BBQ grill on the outdoor veranda. The villa was clean, spacious, private, has everything a single traveler could want and more, just like being at home, but away. would also be ideal for families of 6, it has its own private BBQ on the outdoor veranda. Friendly helpful staff onsite, large pool area with sunbathing and shade, more onsite facilities for your convenience.
Will be definitely rebooking with them again. Fairly priced and well located being near shops, malls, and is a short walk to the touristy things, food, gyms and beaches, totally satisfied with my stay there.
Awesome spot loved it

Horrible mattresses in the bunks, hard and noisy due to the plastic covers. Uncomfortable pillows.
Annoying that the pool slide opening hours coincided with office hours as we were up early and out for the day by 9am so the kids didn’t get to enjoy it. Wouldn’t stay again.
Kids had a ball, loved the pool and water slide. Everything was clean and organised would return

Great spot. Plenty of cabins and very family friendly. Pool is a big hit with the kids and adults! Stayed here a few times and one of the great parks in SE Qld. Rooms are great and plenty of them for decent price. Only bad thing is one grumpy old fella on the staff who is the fun police.

Nobby Beach Holiday Village was a wonderful place to stay for our holiday. The room was very good, the facilities were of a high quality and the location made it easy to find a good coffee, go to the beach and / or the shops.

Excellent on all accounts, family time, activities, water slide, kids park and central location to public transport - awesome restaurants and cafes. Staff go above and beyond if you’re needing them and nothing is ever too much trouble!

This campsite could have great potential, but it is completely ruined by the staff.

We had a mechanical issue with our car during our stay. Because we own a camper trailer and needed the car to move it, we couldn’t leave and were forced to extend our stay.

The woman at reception was rude, unhelpful and showed zero understanding. We asked for help finding someone to assist us with moving our camper trailer and to leave a note at reception — she refused and didn’t even try to help.

She then made us change sites for our extra nights, meaning we had to completely pack up and set everything up again. Thankfully, some very kind neighbours helped us move the camper trailer.

Later, a man came and told us we had to move again because we were supposedly “over the line.” When we explained we couldn’t move the camper trailer without a car, he laughed and sarcastically told us to “just move it by hand.” Completely inappropriate and disrespectful.

No help, no empathy, no professionalism. The human experience here was a disaster.

And to top it off: the showers and toilets were absolutely disgusting. Filthy, dirty, poorly maintained — at all times of the day. Honestly, some of the worst sanitary facilities we’ve seen while travelling.

Such a shame. With better staff and basic hygiene standards, this place could be great. As it is, we do not recommend this campsite.

This location recently tore down the homes of over 40+ permanent residents, LITERALLY...
This action displaced family members and friendship ties within the area, some of 20yrs - 30yrs + having to relocate in other states for housing and much further for others.
No consideration or financial recompense was received to the households affected by this violation.
All independent market values considered including current &/or future market values inclusive of inheritance margins was stripped away without a lawful standing for  permanent residents and their intendees…
All so the venue could charge a premium for your site…LEGIT…
I don’t know about you but I know I would’t stay here…
If your choice of accomodation here, be it a tent, caravan or site, I strongly implore you to reconsider…
This is not an establishment that considers wholesome family values, but instead the complete opposite…
It may have a fancy water slide (prior to permanent housing demolition) but the cost it bares will never remove the scars nor accommodate the financial burden incurred toward the residences and homes that were impacted for its revival…
And if you’re ok with that!….you're a CUintheNT…
Great place to relax with the family

Accommodation was very poor bedding was not clean, kitchen wear not been cleaned,  toilet drip content dirty, outside table and stairs were so dirty and bbq we couldn't sit outside.very disappointed  Kids were happy with the pool.

Not impressed what so ever. Got the studio for my partner and I. One roll of toilet paper for 7 nights stay, never offered fresh towels, tiny shower with a curtain that sticks to you no matter what, splashes everywhere outside it. Absolutely no privacy if you're put near tents. Couldn't have the curtain open at all or door open for a breeze, tents pitched basically at the doorstep. Not the best location, Had to uber everywhere with the light rail not running.
Not worth the money for us
Always a great spot close to everything but hidden from the noise. Good size van sites. Always clean and maintain we stay often and it's our coast go to place.

I'm taking away two atars for the horrible bot that you get to deal with when you call. AI is going to replace humans, well think twice. Ok, we arrived on Christmas day and the instructions were all clear, the keys were locked in a safe at the entrance, no problem there. But, since we missed reading one message (my fault of course) we tried to call and after 75 attempts (slightly exaggerated) we tried to tell the bot 'emergency' and the reply we got was 'a manager will call you asap. We received an sms the next day to check if all was ok... In case of any calamity, you'd have to use the pool water to extinguish fires, candles in case of a power blackout, inflatable pool noodles in case of a flood, but imagin that the wife freaks out and you have nowhere to find shelter? Frustratingly awkward that it is simply not possible to speak to someone at all. What if we hadn't received the code of the safe????
Of course there are good things too. It's relatively affordable, the room (studio) is basic, beds are fine (as long as you don't look underneath it!). Bathroom is modern and clean. Aircon and fan present, working fine.
Cooking facilities, stove, centrally located outside, no issues there.
Location is quite good, less than half an hr drive to Sea World, Movie world, Wet n wild and a short drive from the beach. Really cute bar and restaurant strip a stone throw away.
New tram line is under construction so I'm presuming that this will be convenient to travel to Surfer's paradise.
So, if you are going to the entertainment parks, this place is just fine.
Last but not least, a unique feature, a pretty big slide at the pool! They must be record holders of having the biggest one in the country!

This place is nothing but a scam and a rip-off. They advertise that you’re getting a room, but all you actually get is a concrete slab to park your car on or pitch a freaking tent. Absolutely disgraceful and completely misleading. Avoid this place at all costs.
Price is spot on for what u get

We stayed in one of the “Studios” the room was 3rd world. Peeling paint, an unbelievably loud rusty old air conditioner,  sticky floor, missing blinds so no privacy and cars parking late at night less than a meter from the bed, harsh fluro lighting and nothing even remotely charming. I mean it doesn’t take much to make a space half way decent. Make more of an effort.
Excellent customer service, Good for children with the pool and slids, Great Location, near the marketta, iga, Pacific fair, MMA, Level up and the beach is a nice stroll away.

I don't have enough words to describe the TERRIBLE experience we had in this place. Without a doubt, they ruined our holidays. If I could talk to every person who wants to stay there and recommend them NOT TO GO, I would. Not only was it the most expensive and worst campsite we went to on the entire East Coast, but we also paid for a service we didn't receive and the subsequent treatment was even worse (we booked under my partner's name and also sent an email to the company, but we didn't get a response that took responsibility for what happened). One star is generous to this place and specially for the receptionist that attended us.

TERRIBLE experience. They ruined our holidays. The most expensive and worst campsite we went to on the entire East Coast.|I paid for a service that I didn't take. The experience was disappointing and the subsequent treatment was even worse. They left my situation completely unattended.|Noisy, gross amenities, tiny kitchen, the wifi never worked, the "sites for tents" are actually a tiny place that only fits a caravan.
Good location and good service
A really lovely little caravan park close to everything. Sites are well maintained and amenities were very clean and tidy.
Ich hatte einen Camperstellplatz. Rezeption freundlich.
Great place for the family. Decent size villa.

Unfortunately, we didn’t have a good experience. We arrived quite late and asked for a site for one night. The price was $80, even though we barely spent a full day there. Unfortunately, the Wi-Fi didn’t work, and there was no one at the reception to assist us. The women’s showers were dirty, and most of the doors didn’t close properly. On top of that, we had to take cold showers.
Can’t recommend

Great park. Gold Coast price so not cheap.
Our powered site was great.
Amenities nice and spacious.
Lots of activities for kids.
Close to shops and Broadbeach.
We will be back for the location

Super camping proche de la mer et avec de bons équipements. Les emplacements caravane sont relativement grands et la cuisine est un vrai plus.
Dommage que les emplacements ne soient pas délimités et surtout que les prix des nuits changent d’un jour à l’autre. Quand nous rajoutions des nuits supplémentaires cela pouvait être 60$ pour une nuit, le lendemain 65$ et même 70$. C’est dommage
Great for kids

I was sceptical when booking this place as there were so many mixed reviews but….here is it…Pros: pool area was clean and great for the kids especially with the big water slide, staff were friendly, the deluxe cabin was a perfect size for the 5 of us, (the mattresses on the bunk beds were a bit more on the solid side) but the kids still slept fine, the queen bed was comfy, everything provided for a comfortable week. The park was quiet at night which surprised me. The seafood cart provided on some nights was great, the live entertainment was pretty good on the Thursday night in holidays. Great location, especially to walk to the Marketta Markets (a must stop when food stalls are on). Only 15mins from surfers paradise and about half hour to all the theme parks. Plus side is the light rail is currently being extended so when done will be right outside the park for convenience!! Will be great for our next visit!
Cons: The main bedroom was a bit dusty, ceiling fan was disgusting and needs a wipe down. BUT, that’s it, that’s as bad as I’ve got haha.
Nice place to have a holiday with family

This is the second time in four weeks I have come and it far and wide beats any places we have been. For my boys aged 9 and twins 11 , the facilities are excellent, location excellent and staff are amazing. It's great they put on kids activities and a singer as well. We thoroughly recommend and enjoy it.
Great place for families. Waterslide. Quite clean but not perfect. Loved our time here as there was 11 of us. Close to beach.
객실이 넓고 청결하며 조용해 편안한 숙박이 가능했습니다. 직원들이 친절해 전반적으로 만족스러운 경험이었어요. 또 가렵니다
We took our caravan so we could stay locally to some events in the area we were attending, so it was just what we wanted!

The caravan park is beautiful had a good time but mattress needs to be replaced it killed my back the springs are digging in your back and keep rolling over to the middle of the bed. Going back on the 22nd Dec and hope they give me a good mattress Or we will never go again. I referred this to the staff and said they would let management know. I hope they do.

A beautiful holiday park. Clean, check in was easy and staff were lovely. Was such a nice bonus they upgraded our rooms. All amenities were clean and the park has some really cool things for kids. Really short walk to a strip of restaurants and cafes and not far from the beach. Good central location.
Good and Nice
Should be ashamed of themselves, price they are charging for what they call a cabin is ridiculous. My dog's kennel is nicer.
Super camping, heeft alles wat je nodig hebt. Goed sanitair, goed uitgeruste kampkeuken en heel vriendelijk personeel. We komen graag weer terug!
Great caravan park . Close to bus stops . Shops . Beach

Usual cost for the Gold Coast for a caravan site. The site was nice grass. 5 to 8 mins from broadbeach and pacific fair. Amenities were a bit dated but very clean and tidy. A couple of blocks walk to the beach but has a nice heated pool and a cafe.
Older holiday park, set back just off main highway. Can get abit slippery after rain. Nice big sites. Friendly staff.

⭐ 1 Star – Disgusting, Avoid at All Costs!

This place is an absolute disgrace. I stayed two nights and couldn’t leave fast enough. The blinds were FILTHY—not just dusty but covered in grime. The bunk bed bolts were coming out, which felt unsafe, and the wardrobe runners were thick with dust. It’s obvious that behind the doors, there has never been vacuuming, and the toilet doors were covered in stains.

To top it off, the code to the facilities didn’t even work, so I couldn’t use them at all. I was so disgusted that I had to check out early and book somewhere else. Do yourself a favour—stay anywhere else but here.
We're only using a Caravan space so can't judge the rooms
Great place but unfortunately the light rail construction is causing havoc for traffic and making it very hard to get around in that area...

Nice and quiet caravan park but the amenities really need updating. One hook in the shower cubicle is not enough. Also rubbish on the floor of the toilets was not picked up the whole 3 days we where there..

4 calls over 2 days not answered or returned. Email not returned. Web site would get to credit card then stall. Doubt they have amazing customers if they never answer the phone. Seems to be standard for Gold Coast caravan parks

Have stayed there before BUT this time trying to make booking, getting an answer to phone calls, much less getting a return call or answer to email , trying to book online - obviously our business not required. Very different to Reflections at Kingscliff where they do answer the phone and are very helpful   Very disappointing Nobby. Won’t bother you again.
Friendly easy/early check in, cabin upgraded, was expecting road noise, pleasantly surprised. Short stroll to shops/eateries/coffee.  Tram lines being put in but easy to navigate.  Highly recommend.
Fabulous location,  Fabulous travellers in caravan park

We booked a caravan site.
It was like staying at a big muddy parking area with no drainage. Amenities were old and dirty. They need to be knocked down and rebuilt. Lucky we had our own to use.
Camp kitchen was filthy.
Sites were too close together.
Large permanent live in area. Didn’t feel safe at night. This park has nothing going for it.
Would not recommend this place.
❤️❤️👌🏻👌🏻 absolutely enjoy everything I recommended to everyone visit there and enjoy the life

We stayed for one night to go and watch the football at Cbus Super Stadium. The room was clean and comfortable, the showers and toilets were easily accessible and spotlessly clean. The staff were lovely and welcoming. The location was perfect for what we wanted to do, short walk to the SLSC for food and drinks as well as other shops. I was particularly impressed with the security of the park in that to enter at either entrance, you needed a key or the passcode. We would definitely stay here again!
Pitched a tent, they did nothing wrong, just a regular campground.
Amenities a bit tired, but not important. Being clean enough IS important. A bit more attention is required.
Very pretty campsite. Friendly and pleasant staff.

I'm very grateful my G'day membership & reception gave me a suprise cabin upgrade upon arrival 🙏🏼 Thank you, it meant alot! Reception were friendly on the phone :)

Unfortunately after another poor sleep, I feel like these things need mentioning to warn others & to hopefully see improvement for the future:

Upon entering the cabin, it smelled like sour beer, dust & mold.

There was a blood stain on the bathroom window sill, marks & dust on the walls & the blanket I took from the bunk room smelled unclean

I woke up with dry skin & sore eyes everyday, breathing in the dust. After reading some of the other reviews I'm questioning if the bedding was clean?

There's a sign that says to clean up after yourself or you might incur a cleaning charge, so I question what kind of cleaning happens prior to your visit?

There was also a very rusty toilet brush holder 🤢

This park is in a "Free wifi zone" & the cabin was right under low power lines, directly next to the highway where there is construction happening.

My entire 3 night stay I felt very off from these, I was both exhausted & "charged" from all the electricity 😅

If you want to use the fan or aircon in the lounge room, the door curtains unavoidably move around, making noise &  removing your privacy for everyone outside to see inside the cabin at night :/

I was initially planning to camp longer term in my van at this site, but the camp sites appeared overcrowded close to each other on a muddy uneven surface & would of heard the construction outside.

The cabin was 80% sound proofed from the construction & highway with all the windows closed, except for the odd loud cars/motorcycles, however there was animals &/or cockroaches climbing through the walls & roof at all hours of the night 😄

Finally despite the free wifi zone, the wifi connected once & couldn't connect again or to the TV 😄

Overall there is pros & cons, deeply grateful for the upgrade, it's nice to walk to the beach, however I wouldn't stay again at this stage.
Good location, easy access to the beach and surfers paradise via bus. Trams are underway. Staff are friendly and facilities are clean.
We chose Nobby Beach Holiday Village as it was close to GC airport as we needed somewhere to stay the night as we had an early flight. It suited our budget and purpose and was very comfortable.

It's always an amazing & stunning Cpark stay at. The pool , waterslide and other activities including live music 🎵🎶 near the  pool ..and the accomodations...the staff at the park. Pop up fish and chips |The family's - travellers everyone is so happy ag this park.|Love it thag it is so very close to my Grandkids as🙌well.|That's why I choose to stay he're..it's about a five minutes walk to there home from Nobbys beach Cpark.|☀️🌊✌️🎵🎶🫶✅💯

Great location close walk to the beach and shops. Pool is heated and the kids loved the waterslide. Great playgrounds on site one for bigger kids too. Staff were really welcoming and friendly. We got a powered site it did have a lean which made it a bit awkward parking the camper. Facilities are a little run down. Missing tiles, and just needing a good clean
A great holiday place, caravan parking with plenty of room and onsite cabins.  The pool with water slide, great playground facilities and many clean bbq's made for a great stay 👌

Booked for an overnight stay in a studio-type accommodation. The receptionist provided a key for RM 28, but upon inspecting the room, we discovered it was occupied. The receptionist was unresponsive, prompting my husband to visit the office and inform her. We were then given a new room, RM 26, but found the bed sheets to be dirty. We requested an immediate change. Due to the establishment's disorganization, I advised my husband against returning. Furthermore, the bathroom contained unpleasant odours from unknown sources.
Great location great staff
Lovely clean facilities!! Family friendly accommodation. Walking distance from the beach.
Great management team

Powered site.
Very wet underfoot due to heavy rain.

It’s an okay place but never ever answer phones or emails, tried for weeks leading up to our stay as we were staying with friends and hoped to reserve sites close to each other. They were happy for us to sort it out ourselves when we got there so that’s nice but could’ve been sorted many weeks prior.

Other thing to note is the permanent residents driving in and out without checking for kids, a little fast for comfort, and one resident made himself comfortable in our site which was okay at first however  when told to leave for making us (particularly our female friends) uncomfortable,  came back an hour later much more intoxicated and tried to fight the guys in our group (mwhen asked to leave a second time, he ended up saying he’s lucky he didn’t kill our friend as he was being told to leave. Management are apparently aware of him so I’m not sure why he would still be allowed to stay.

The best part was the pool and big slide, the kids did have an absolute ball… just lucky they were sleeping when the unfortunate resident showed up. We wouldn’t stay here again, though.

Can't complain with the park itself however if you are needing a refund or dealing with management (i.e good luck even trying to get them to answer the phones!)... then forget it!  They have shortchanged me in my refund and appears i won't see that money again. They have ignored alot of my many many phone calls/emails/voicemails over the last 12 months.  This is absolutely not how you run a business I'm sorry Nobbys! One star from me (which i warned about) and will not be bringing back our whole sports team this year as we have done in previous years.

Awesome place to stay, great rooms lots to do especially for the kids.
The staff are very helpful and friendly highly recommended.
A lovely campground. The staff were very helpful and friendly. All amenities were well kept, clean and easy to access and use. We had a wonderful stay.

Points positifs : camping accueillant, propre, sanitaires toujours propres.
Points négatifs : nous étions dans une cabine, vétuste, eau chaude qui ne marchait pas. Le Wifi ne fonctionnait vraiment pas bien, une horreur.

Tried calling a few days before check-in during business hours but no one answered, and we didn’t receive a call back.
However, check-in was fast, and the staff were friendly and helpful.

We stayed in a Basic Studio — the room was small and the soundproofing wasn’t great; we could hear people talking and their TV from the next room. But overall, it was still comfortable, and the bathroom was conveniently close.

The highlight was definitely the waterslide — super fun!
Also, it’s very close to the beach.

Next time, if we come back, we’d love to try the villa.

Amazing!  We had a lovely, relaxing holiday prior to Christmas. We were able to secure a pool side penthouse. This was incredibly comfortable and perfect for the four of us. It’s two-story, has a living room, kitchen, powder room downstairs, x2 bedrooms and bathroom upstairs. Very modern, super clean, has all you need. The bunk room sleeps up to 4. The staff were so friendly and very accommodating/helpful. So close to the shops, restaurants, public transport and beach!  It has a couple of play grounds and a kids play room. Inside the park you feel like you’re at a resort, very family friendly, safe and secure. Plenty of sites for vans too Highly recommend!
Awesome place to stay.

Stayed here numerous times, and our family loves it. Kids mostly they have a great time.
Staff always friendly. Kids never want to leave.
Can't rate it enough.
Very good although we couldn’t get internet even though it advertises it which we do tend to book by. Great pool and slide, hubby loved it!! Nice ambient atmosphere

Where do you start..deluxe tropical cabin was not as expected..neither deluxe or tropical unless you count the many cockroach coming out the drains..dust covered surfaces and smelly laundry..barely sufficient crockery or utensils..paid $$$ for this and would highly recommend staying elsewhere..seriously needs someone to check in on this place.

We stayed in a Deluxe Tropical Cabin for 8 nights, definitely not deluxe and you pay for deluxe, dusty, damp and cockroach infested, they were coming out the drains, we emailed management, all they did was come and spray with cheap flyspray, we had already emptied a can throughout, noted they bombed a cabin after guests left 1 down from us, they did not check in or contact us at anytime, overall the place really requires some TLC, would recommend doing your homework on other places to stay in the area.

Stayed in the penthouse poolside villa, wasn’t cheap, thinking for that price you’d expect more. Quite run down and dirty! Sofas had sand all over it, floors were dirty and sticky, bunk bed had chunks of dust and some sort of food crumbs stuck on blankets. The dust was ridiculous!! One of our kids woke up with conjunctivitis. Fans have thick layers of dust on it. Pubic hair found on the bed!! Toaster was broken, dead cockroach in cutlery drawers, aircon remote was not working, used old tea bag’s left on patio floor, the walls are filthy especially beside the stairs you can see hand marks smeared all over it…it was very hard to relax wondering if the place was properly cleaned. The place is in desperate need of a DEEP clean.

I would give less but the assistant manager Alex was nice to deal with and he helped compensate us and provide new blankets.

The only good thing is the location and the waterslide slide.

RUN AWAY FROM THIS PLACE! Impossible to sleep at night because of the major construction work right next door! We were in a rooftop tent and no one warned us about the noise when we booked! And no response from the campsite when we tried to ask them for help! With this price, run away or go somewhere else, it's better!

The manager is a grumpy rude unfriendly person who makes you feel unwelcome. The area around the caretakers shed looks like a tip. 3 out of the 5 male toilets had no toilet paper at all. The water slide stairs and railings are all rusted and don't look like the pictures. No plug in the communal kitchen sink and despite the sign on the kitchen fridge regarding daily clean out and products not labled with guests names we found it a mess. The camp site grass was muddy and had sink holes. Despite the on site shop opening hrs it just opens when the grumpy manager decides to get there. The gutter on the unit was falling down which we re clipped up into its brackets. This place was budget but well below budget in so many ways. It sits under the flight path from the airport and there was noisy construction out side the park from the new tram way. Even when the tram way is built I will never come back to this place nor would I ever recommend it to my friends or even my enemies not that I have any but maybe I will now from the park manager and or owners for speaking my truth.||Bertron

Great location, clean and organised. Enjoyed walks to the beach. follow us on YouTube
Sweet az RVN
Seem to never answer their phone. Called multiple times at different times of the day and on different days. No answer straight to message bank.

Avoid Nobby Beach Holiday Village at All Costs – Infested with Cockroaches, Filthy, Terrible Service, and Ridiculously Overpriced||I cannot even begin to describe how horrendous my stay at Nobby Beach Holiday Village was, especially with two small children. From the moment we arrived, it was a complete disaster. Especially after we paid $500 a night for it! Nobby Beach Holiday Village was ridiculously overpriced for the disgusting state it was in.||We were placed in a “villa” at Nobby Beach Holiday Village that was absolutely infested with cockroaches—everywhere. They were in the rooms, in the bathroom, and even dead cockroaches in the hotel pool. My children were terrified and understandably so. Needless to say, it was extremely unhygienic. The level of filth and neglect was shocking, and it made the entire experience unbearable.||The rooms at Nobby Beach Holiday Village were filthy—dust and grime in every corner. The air conditioning was leaking heavily, so we couldn’t even use it with 30+ degrees outside, which made the room incredibly uncomfortable. The hob didn’t work. Everything felt like it had been neglected for far too long.||The customer service at Nobby Beach Holiday Village was an absolute joke. I was promised a 50% refund for all the issues, but three months later, I still haven’t seen a penny. They’ve kept coming up with one excuse after another, like claiming I didn’t provide my full credit card details, including the CVV number (which is an unsafe request and unnecessary). I even offered my bank account details for a bank transfer, and they completely ignored me.||Booking.com has been absolutely useless in solving this issue. They offered a virtual card solution for Nobby Beach Holiday Village to refund, but the hotel still hasn’t followed through. It’s been an endless runaround, and no one at Nobby Beach Holiday Village or Booking.com seems to care or take responsibility for the situation.||Do yourself a favor and stay far away from Nobby Beach Holiday Village. It was a nightmare for my family, and the management has shown zero professionalism or integrity. There are plenty of great places to stay in the area, for the same price or less, where you can expect the least – a clean bed without cockroaches to sleep in.
Great location and so good for kids. Everything you need within walking distance.  Tent, van or cabins by the pool, this little gem has it all.
The amenities are a bit tired and therefore never look clean (although they were).

Worst experience ever !! Booked new garden studio as stand alone building in quiet area but on check in got changed to standard studio. Reception said studios are interchangeable. Standard studio is 70motel that was so dirty old run down !!

Booked a powered site for our motorhome for 1 night. Our ETA was 1/2hr before check in so called and we were able to check in early! Friendly staff at check in and also gave us the option to extend our stay if we want to!
Basic cabins, old but functional. Kids enjoyed the water slide.

After driving for a few hours, I arrived to find my cabin was ready early, and I was upgraded! The staff were all friendly.
The cabin was clean with everything I required for my 3 night stay.
The pool was clean and so refreshing on those hot days!

Quality accommodation, affordable pricing, helpful staff... Great location on the Coast

Will be back ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Die Lage ist gut, in wenigen Minuten zu Fuss ist man bei Einkaufsmöglichkeiten, Restaurants und auch am Strand. Die Poolanlage ist auch gut mit Riesenrutsche und ausreichend Liegen. Die WC-Anlagen sind dafür eine Katastrophe. Teilweise kaputt, dreckig und während den ganzen 3 Tagen ohne Seife im Spender.

Easy walk to the beach as well as shops for meals or drinks.  NB: some roadwork going on to instal a tram line so that affects your car access but not too big a hassle - you just can’t drive in from the main highway. Clean facilities, good pressure in the showers - it would be good to have an extra hook in each stall as there is no curtain so it’s hard to avoid your clothes getting wet. Ibis birds stroll around, good pool, kiosk and even a waterslide.
Good place
Not for adults, too many children.

The hotel was nice overall. The location is really convenient, being just a short distance from Surfers Paradise, which made it easy to explore the area. The room was clean and comfortable, though it wasn’t anything too extraordinary. Still, it provided everything I needed for a pleasant stay. Staff were friendly, and the price was reasonable for what you get. A solid option if you're looking for somewhere close to the action without being in the middle of it all.
Awesome place and scene
Has to be one of the cleanest parks I've ever stayed at even the toilet blocks were spotless . 10 out of 10
Always a great place to stay Always clean and friendly staff
No issues, great place to stay, in cabins, caravans or tents. They are currently extending sires/cabins.

Wir verbrachten im Oktober eine Nacht auf einem Powered Campsite im Nobby Beach Holiday Village und waren insgesamt zufrieden! Trotz des durchgehenden Regens konnten wir uns erholen, da der Campingplatz ruhig gelegen und gepflegt ist.

Unser Stellplatz war gross genug und bot alle Annehmlichkeiten, die wir brauchten. Die Sanitäranlagen waren sauber. Das gesamte Team war freundlich und hilfsbereit.

Wir können diesen Campingplatz für Kurzaufenthalte durchaus empfehlen.

Loved to stay there
Will be back to stay

We have been staying at Nobby's now for many years, we have watched it grow into a beautiful resort, to suit all travellers. We stayed recently with 4 year old grandson and we all had a ball. Music, face painting and a visit from the lovely Emma with her fish and chips van in Wednesdays. Thanks to the nice staff. See you again soon
Julie

Our stay was exceptional! Every Staff Member & Management we encountered were friendly, hospitable and welcoming! Cannot fault them! Facilities were very well maintained! We were lucky enough to spend the V8 supercars weekend here, which during this time Halloween activities were on! Kids were thrilled! DJ, Face Painting & Trick or Treating, what a fantastic idea! We will most certainly be back :)
Super nice place right near Mermaid beach and they put on a great Halloween set of events which our daughter loved.

We stayed in the poolside penthouse, for $450 a night and honestly it feels like a crack den, the front door is no good it's very small, and very dirty.. my feet were black from walking on the floor inside for no longer the 20 mins. Found dead coachroaches down the side of couch. Rubbish left from other people. Staff are very friendly and nice, but this place needs a overhaul and I'll be speaking with reception upon check out.
Great place to stay but not so good if you don't have a vehicle
Spectacular place to stay, great accommodation, close to shops and beach. Kid friendly place

We booked the wrong date by mistake (instead of September we booked for November). So we arrived a bit after the office hours and rang the bell where the lady told us she did not have a booking from us for that day. After figuring out what happened she came back to the office and managed to still get us a powered campsite for 2 nights - and even more kindly we only had to pay for one of the bookings even though the one for November did not have free cancellation, but she changed the dates for us.
Great camp kitchen - after staying at dozens of campgrounds in Queensland we finally found that gas stove at Nobby Beach Holiday Village to have a decent fire. They also had all the other things you need (like toaster, microwave, …), two huge pans and a stove top kettle. The kitchen was clean and nice to use.
There was a little leisure room with a huge (pretty new looking) TV, a sofa, some other sitting options and a book exchange.
Showers and toilets were in good condition and clean.

Not a nice campsite!
Almost all of the facilities are old, the ground is not really maintained, the camp kitchen is incredibly dirty, laundry has been hanging on the line or on the grass for days, which nobody cares about, the men's toilets smell strongly of urine throughout, the floor is wet throughout and underpants have been lying there in a corner for days, which shows how long it has apparently not been cleaned. And for that it’s not a cheap campground!
Oh and the WiFi isn’t worth it calling it WiFi because it’s not strong at all.

This park was not as advertised,  the caravan sites are very cramped. The pool was not heated as advertised.  The local pool was, though, so we used that.Whilst the owners have in their reply stated the pool is heated year round and tested each morning,  their staff have advised the heaters are turned off due to very warm weather.

I've been there lately for just two nights. The cabin house is good but it's not that clean. We couldn't access the internet for the whole days we stayed and then one time we went out, it took us 10 minutes before we got out. The pass code for the gate didn't work. We tried several times, and I even went back to the house just to make sure we pressed the right code. But then we didn't know there was someone in the reception where the cameras were. My husband went in and told the staff to open up the gate. I don't understand why it didn't open up for us. Before us, the other cars passed by already , and their past code worked properly. It's impossible the staff didn't see us on camera,I just felt like the staff is playing on us.

I received an unexpected upgrade. I had the pleasure of experiencing the 2 story poolside penthouse. It was clean, great view of the pool, the bed was comfy, large shower, the fans on when I arrived and it had everything I needed. The grounds are secure with gates. Great communication from staff who were friendly and helpful. Would definitely stay here again.
Didn’t stay here but visited people who stayed. WOW, nice cabins, secure and pool facilities excellent. Will definitely book here in our next trip

After viewing this holiday Village online with there AMAZING photos I would have to say, photo edit was definitely well over used. After I purchased the deluxe family room for my large family and traveled over 7 hours away. I was surprised to enter our deluxe family room only to find it would be no bigger then a standard 2 person villa with 2 extra beds squeezed in. Bunk beds were absolutely horrible. The beds are covered in a plastic cover, like jail beds and are so noisy when children move on them. Very uncomfortable and cold from the plastic covers. Bunk Bed's are not made on arrival and are very hard to make due to small space and plastic covering the sheets come straightback out, leaving you laying on a very cold bed. Parents room is a double bed and again very small space and uncomfortable bed.
Bring your own towels or expect to wash your own. I like to go away and not do chores however at this holiday get away your only given 1 towel each and required to wash them as needed.  They do not give extras. I was extremely disappointed as for our short stay i did not have time to spend washing and drying towels daily, due to having to SOP up the entire bathroom after every shower as the bathroom is dangerously flooded with water after every shower use. The only way to clean the floor is with the towels your provided. Also if you use your 2 rolls of toilet paper provided for the family they also do not give more so bring that as well.
The parking, well dont expect to get a park out the front of your room because its basically first in best dressed. Which leaves you parking away from your villa to unpack and pack your car.
The pool is heated and is honestly the only highlight of the park, for children that is.. so if you want to have heated pool give this holiday park a go your children will love the slide too.
Pool area & slide top notch 👌
Great park, staff are amazing- especiallymanagement, during our stay that had extra things on, live music, Facepainting, food trucks etc. Keep up the great work team.
Stayed there for 2 nights in a van. Nice atmosphere, easy access to the public kitchen and laundry inside the ground.
We had a twin bedroom cabin and loved it! Great location and close to the places I wanted to visit and a great place to chill out around the pool. Kids loved the slide!
Fabulous, friendly and helpful staff
Was comfortable. Enjoyed the stay. Found parking difficult inside. Very busy with tents taking up grassed areas.

Very clean and comfy beds and I liked that the aircon worked. Room was quite small, really couldn't have fit a third real size person as well, lucky that one pulled out,  having said that I wasn't expecting too much for the price, good value.

Well maintained park except for womens restrooms. No matter what time of day the floor was wet. It was like it had just been mopped with mop straight out of the bucket.
One toilet at excrement down the back of it for 3 days.
There was grime all around the basin taps and water spout.
A  bundle of dirty linen sat on a bench just inside the door for a  whole day. It was hard to get toilet paper out of the dispenser when the roll was new and the end of the roll was not broken and pulled down at time of loading. This caused small pieces of paper which had broken off as people tried to find the end of the roll to drop to the floor  in cubicles.
A scrunchy or handkerchief sat on a bench in a cubicle for almost two days.
Such friendly helpful people 😌
Great park clean amenities central to everything pool and park good for kids 😀

Not a bad little park, tucked away off the highway.

Grounds have been maintained and saw plenty of maintenance staff, checking pools, doing bins etc like most parks.

In would really benifort from a mini makeover aesthetically, but all in all, not bad.

Our room on the other hand, we had a Penthouse Pool View, pretty run down. Floors were flithy, to the point it was cleaner for the kids to keep their thongs on, otherwise the floors through out made them black. Store room has a vent to the plumbing service, that's fallen off.

Hot water needed to drain about a third of Hinze Dam to get it to the room, so would hate to see the water bill, literally 60 seconds or more to start getting heat.

Ground floor toilet stopped filling, appears the flushing valve has been replaced but sticks, so flush and it doesn't refill unless you lift the lid and tap the float.

Then the AC system, all Daiken, which are a quality unit, however both filters in the upper and lower look to have never been checked, I cleaned the main rooms in the shower before we used it, but not really something a guest should have to do.

Park is good, location is good but for mine, the cleaners need a tune up to what they should be cleaning properly and what to check.
Not far from the beach and shops. Nice and quiet.
Nice for the Gold Coast for the price

We absolutely loved everything about our stay here. The staff were very friendly. We loved the size of the park, the location but most of all the pool, slide and live music and free face painting. It was definitely worth every cent and we will be coming back! Thank you for helping us create some beautiful family memories ❤️

Had originally booked a Deluxe Poolside Villa for my family to stay for 3 nights. We were unfortunately greeted with an excessive amount of cockroaches in the first night. I did ask management if we could change rooms which they happily let us swap. No refund was given for the price difference between the rooms or the inconvenience of needing to change.

Only given 7gb of WiFi per booking per stay. Was unable to connect to the WiFi to watch Netflix, so we had to use phones to stream.

Great pool, ninja park and toddler area. Villas were nice, although a little small.

Rooms were a bit narrow. However, okay for the price. The dishwasher liquid and the spare bin bag were wrapped inside the kitchen towel, which should have been in a visible place. The caravan space was also narrow, and I felt like there was barely any privacy there.
Also, the internet service was poor with only 6GB capped usage. I ended up using my mobile internet.
Their no refund policy also needs to be changed. I wouldn't want to be forced to stay at any place.
Room was OK for the price, although it was missing 2 blinds so it didn't allow for much privacy

Great varavan park very clean and well kept.
Concrete slabs on caravan sites (not sure if all sites but most) nice looking vabins (didn't go inside any).
Camp kitchen is large open lots of tables, no communial pots n pans so byo.
Large pool with massive waterslide.
Kids playground just near pool and camp kitched.
And also a 'Ninja play park" for older kids
"The Hub" with tables and chairs and games room.
Overall has everything covered.
We loved our little cabin, it is a little tired but definitely good value for money. Our grandkids loved all the play areas and the pool. They can't wait to return. We will definitely return.
Nice location! Next time I will try better room style to stay. The pool and and BBQ area is good for family trip.

Preis für die Lage okay. Wlan inklusive - gut! Leider wurde unser Essen im Kühlschrank, obwohl eindeutig mit den ausgegebenen Labeln gekennzeichnet, „entsorgt“ - absolutes NoGo! Kennzeichnet euer Essen also mit einem riesigen Schild, sonst schmeißen sie es weg.
Good camp-site maybe the caravans part a little cramped. Great pool slide for the kids. The beach is 3 blocks away. About a 15min walk
Was given an upgrade to a deluxe cabin.  Great experience, great location
Stopped over in an RV.  Facilities good.  Location next to main highway disappointing.  Close to lots of bars and food though.   Too built up an area for me after days of open spaces next to beaches.
Friendly staff, very clean facilities.
Lovely staff and great entertainment for the kids. We spent most of our time in the pool and at the playgrounds. Would recommend
Stayed in a camp site nice place good toilets and camp kitchen my son loved the pool and slide a little bit of a walk but not bad to the beach but good and close to shops

We came here for my daughter’s 10th birthday and the staff were absolutely amazing and delivered a gift to our room for my girls birthday. It made it so special for her. Staying in the poolside penthouse the kids can swim and we can watch them from the deck.

Our family of 4 stayed in a Basic Studio Apartment with shared bathroom over the Australia Day long weekend and it was so nice. The unit has all you need for a short stay and had aircon 🙌 and the camp kitchen is just across from the units with BBQ's and more seating. Bathrooms are also just opposite the units and was neat and clean. The pool and waterslide is great and my bigger kids loved the monkey bar playground. The location is great, lots of restaurants close by and beach also close, we walked to Miami Marketta on Saturday night and had such a great time there. The staff at check-in was so nice and helpful with loads of tips to do in the area plus they had a great selection of entertainment happening for the kids. We'll definitely be back!
Stayed in the poolside penthouse, pool was great for kids with waterslide
Great facilities and near beach
Great facilities and great service from dedicated staff!

I love the villa style accommodation, it suits our family’s needs. To have the kitchen facilities it helps if you just want to eat in for dinner and make breakfast daily. The kids loved the pool and the playground.
Waterslide is to dangerous for kids nearly falling off side cockroaches in rooms and mattresses terrible

The laundry room has 4 washers and 2 dryers. To accommodate quite a bit of people so it's a bit of a war. Constantly waiting for people to come back and collect their clothing from the machines so you can use it. There's no telling how long they'll be either and no one can do anything about it. Same as your allocated parking spot. Not supposed to be used by others but they still do and again. No body can do anything about it 🤔
But overall it was nice
Great place

My wife and kids for a beautiful couple of days down the Gold Coast thought we would stop in to Nobbys beach very disappointed nothing was cleaned didn’t realise this until the next morning because we got there on dusk during rain next morning we were all very sick ended up in hospital where they did not offer any medical support and gave us a refund for our one night and sent us on our way all my God

Great cabin very clean with a large balcony and a  BBQ all on one level.
Great facilities for the young family play park and pool. Very close to restaurants and places to visit.

For a lower budget accomodation site I found it to be an almost perfect stay. The staff were really friendly and helpful and even provided us a late checkout. Everything was clean, the pool facilities nice. And just a short walk to the beach and a few shops. Not the most aesthetic rooms, but clean and practical. I just wish for a site this big they didn’t provide single use plastic dishwashing liquid and washing powder. Would love to see bigger companies moving away from that. And even providing a recycling bin in their rooms would be great.

An excellent place to stay. Girls loved  the slide and pool, a short walk to the beach and lots to do at the park. The ninja playground was a huge hit!

A great place for a family holiday.
Family friendly,  very clean and a great all around experience.  Thanks guys will be back.

Rented a basic studio and it was amazing I was really impressed by it and staff where Also very helpful and polite I will definitely be staying there again when I'm in the area and I plan on bringing my kids and niece's and nephews as they will love the pool and water slide definitely a great spot for a family vacation and it was also a fair price for its location
Fabulously clean caravan park, with all the facilities you would require
Really good for your money

Lovely modern, clean and up to date facilities. We were treated to a free upgrade on arrival, didn't even ask, it was a lovely suprise.

The cabins are well self contained with a kitchen including stove, and a clean outside BBQ. Aircon in the main room and main bedroom, fans in the main room and kids room.

Games room for the kids and a decent size heated pool with a terrific water slide.

Perfectly situated for any activities. Pretty much all the Gold Coast is within 20 to 30 minutes drive. Short walk to the beach aswell, which is hard to park at.

All round great place, I'd definitely come back.

Only thing i can recommend for staff is the trees/bushes behind the cabins brush up against the walls in the wind and you can hear it all night, might just need a trim. Didn't keep me up though.
Solid holiday park, nice pool and water slide!
expensive tariff for the deal, but we needed the location

My family of 4 stayed one of the sea breeze villas for 7 days. We loved it. Villa was clean.  Split system in loungeroom and also the bedroom. All the appliances looked brand new and they even leave windows open to air the rooms out once the villas are unoccupied. Kids loved the pool and the slide and the area we stayed in had a grass area for the kids to play around on. The reviews you see will be from people who stayed in the cheaper rooms don't let this scare you away. It was a nice place overall and we will come back again.

Great for a night stopover. But if you are thinking longer term I’d personally give it a miss.

The site itself is tight although we did have our own hard standing area and we were positioned close to the amenities but that’s the only bonus on this occasion.

Staff were helpful and friendly, WiFi was weak and we weren’t to far from the office.

Toilets and showers were clean and regularly kept that way. It’s a 39 minute Uber to the hub of the Gold Coast which cost us $22 which wasn’t too bad. Also you have a Cole’s a short drive down from the site.

Would I stay again. Probably not.
Amazing stay

A prefect little weekend away, we have been twice now. Both times have had 7 cabins booked- they were so accommodating.
Ice cream eating challenge on the Saturday pool side was a laugh.
Enjoy your next stay at nobbys beach holiday village
My aunt lives there!

Booked a powered camp site. Easy to find, great location, and a very nice village! Friendly, helpful staffs who came over to help when they saw us struggling with our van. 👍🏻 5 star facilities - BBQ, laundry room, shower rooms all were very clean and plenty available. Only downside was the laundry machines only used coins!
Clean cabin with modern appliances, kids facilities excel expectations. Ninja course and poolslide help to keep the kids entertained.
Great park, abit tight for vans

Close enough to the beach to go for a  walk each day. Good bars and restaurants close.
Sites are a bit small but well maintained.
A very well run and organised village. Also, clean and nicely presented.
A lovely, small holiday village. High standard of clean in unit. Nice pool and water slide, with lovely restaurants a short stroll away. Friendly and helpful reception.
The best, we will definitely be returning.
For the price wise. Clean, comfortable and inexpensive accomodation. Centrally located Nobby Beach, GC.
We were very happy that we were upgraded to a more expensive cabin. The cabin was spacious and very comfortable.

We had a family unit for 3 nights. It's reasonably priced and a good spot if you dont want to stay at surfers. The water slide is fun. The bad: Our TV doesn't work... tried ringing the office at 3pm on a weekend, but there was no answer (in all honesty what are they going to do by the time we leave anyway? lol).

We were trying to entertain a 2 year old. The wifi range to our unit was limited, rendering it barely usable. Trying to park a big car into the provided small car space is risky. There are no locks on the bathroom door, so the kids just roam in freely. Lots of negatives are easily fixable but frustrating to deal with when travelling.
